data.title: EnSilica Seeks OTCQB Cross-Listing to Reach North American Investors
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Ensilica PLC ( (GB:ENSI) ) has issued an update.

EnSilica plc has applied for its ordinary shares to be cross-traded on the OTCQB Venture Market in the United States, aiming to make it easier for North American investors to access and trade the stock. The shares will remain primarily listed on AIM under the ticker ENSI, with the company set to confirm the start of OTCQB trading once regulatory approval is granted.

The planned OTCQB quotation is intended to broaden EnSilica’s shareholder base and enhance liquidity by tapping into a larger pool of international investors. This move may strengthen the company’s visibility in a key semiconductor investment market and could support its long-term growth ambitions across its target end markets.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:ENSI) stock is a Hold with a £46.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Ensilica PLC stock, see the GB:ENSI Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on ENSI Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ENSI is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak financial performance—declining revenue, ongoing losses, and sharply deteriorating free cash flow—despite a reasonably leveraged balance sheet. Technicals are a key offset, showing strong upside momentum with the price well above major moving averages, though indicators are nearing stretched levels. Valuation is also a drag because the company is loss-making (negative P/E) and no dividend yield is available.

To see Spark’s full report on ENSI stock, click here.

More about Ensilica PLC

EnSilica plc is a fabless, application-specific chipmaker specialising in RF, mmWave, mixed-signal and complex digital IC design. The company serves space and communications, industrial, automotive and healthcare markets where safety, security and reliability are critical, leveraging reusable IP and silicon platforms to deliver scalable, production-proven solutions from its UK headquarters and global design centres.

Average Trading Volume: 304,206

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: £49.94M

For a thorough assessment of ENSI stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Cascadia Strikes Agnico Eagle Alliance, Earn-In and Equity Deal to Accelerate Yukon Exploration
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An update from Cascadia Minerals Ltd ( (TSE:CAM) ) is now available.

Cascadia Minerals Ltd. has entered a multi-year strategic alliance with Agnico Eagle Mines to explore gold and copper targets in Yukon’s Stikine Terrane, with Agnico Eagle funding at least $500,000 annually for generative exploration and additional costs for staking and acquisitions. Cascadia’s Macks, Milner, Byng and Mars properties, plus 2,834 newly staked claims including several new prospects, will be advanced under this framework with Cascadia acting as operator.

Under a separate earn-in agreement, Agnico Eagle can earn up to an 80% interest in Cascadia’s Catch Property by spending $30 million on work over six years, with up to $5 million of exploration planned for the 2026 field season across the alliance and Catch. Concurrently, Agnico Eagle is investing $7.6 million as part of $8.9 million of total equity issuances for a 19.9% stake in Cascadia, bolstering the junior explorer’s balance sheet and enabling accelerated work at its 100%-owned Carmacks Property while advancing its Stikine Terrane portfolio with limited shareholder dilution.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:CAM) stock is a Hold with a C$0.26 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Cascadia Minerals Ltd stock, see the TSE:CAM Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on CAM Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, CAM is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak financial performance (no revenue, ongoing losses, and continued cash burn), despite a clean no-debt balance sheet. Technicals are a meaningful positive with price above key moving averages and positive MACD. Valuation remains pressured by negative earnings and no dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on CAM stock, click here.

More about Cascadia Minerals Ltd

Cascadia Minerals Ltd. is a mineral exploration company focused on gold and copper projects in Yukon, particularly within the highly prospective but underexplored Stikine Terrane. The company also owns and is advancing the Carmacks Property, positioning itself as an early mover in a region analogous to British Columbia’s Golden Triangle.

Average Trading Volume: 250,031

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$36M

See more insights into CAM stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Brinova Fastigheter Calls 2026 AGM With Multi-Channel Voting Options
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from Brinova Fastigheter AB Class B ( ($SE:BRIN.B) ) is now available.

Brinova Fastigheter AB has convened its Annual General Meeting for 7 May 2026 in Helsingborg, giving shareholders the option to participate in person, by proxy or via postal voting in line with the Swedish Companies Act and the company’s articles. Shareholders must be registered with Euroclear Sweden by 28 April 2026 and follow specific notification and documentation procedures, particularly for postal votes, nominee-registered holdings and proxy representation.

The notice details that Brinova has 230,261,173 shares outstanding, split between class A and class B shares, corresponding to 637,455,652 votes and that the company holds no treasury shares. The AGM agenda includes the presentation of the 2025 annual and consolidated reports, auditor opinions including on sustainability, and resolutions on adoption of the financial statements and allocation of profits, signaling routine but important governance and capital decisions for investors.

The most recent analyst rating on ($SE:BRIN.B) stock is a Hold with a SEK13.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Brinova Fastigheter AB Class B stock, see the SE:BRIN.B Stock Forecast page.

More about Brinova Fastigheter AB Class B

Brinova Fastigheter AB is a Swedish public real estate company focused on owning, developing and managing properties. The company’s share capital consists of two share classes, with class A shares carrying higher voting power than class B shares, reflecting a governance structure that concentrates voting rights among A shareholders.

YTD Price Performance: -20.44%

Average Trading Volume: 59,265

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: SEK2.91B

data.title: United Therapeutics’ Tyvaso Shows Pivotal Success in IPF
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

United Therapeutics ( (UTHR) ) has shared an update.

On March 30, 2026, United Therapeutics reported that its 598-patient phase 3 TETON-1 trial of nebulized Tyvaso in idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis met its primary endpoint, showing a 130.1 mL advantage in forced vital capacity over placebo at 52 weeks and reduced risk of clinical worsening, with consistent benefits across subgroups and no new safety signals. Integrated analyses of TETON-1 and TETON-2 confirmed significant treatment effects on lung function and key secondary outcomes, and the company said the unprecedented IPF data from TETON alongside its recent ralinepag success mark an inflection point for growth as it prepares an FDA filing to add IPF to Tyvaso’s label, potentially reshaping the treatment landscape for this underserved disease.

The most recent analyst rating on (UTHR) stock is a Hold with a $486.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on United Therapeutics stock, see the UTHR Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on UTHR Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, UTHR is a Outperform.

The score is driven primarily by exceptional financial strength (high margins, strong cash generation, and debt eliminated) and supportive earnings-call fundamentals with meaningful pipeline catalysts. Offsetting factors are mixed near-term technical momentum, competitive/binary execution risk, and valuation support limited by the lack of a provided dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on UTHR stock, click here.

More about United Therapeutics

United Therapeutics Corp., a Nasdaq-listed public benefit corporation, develops therapies for rare cardiopulmonary and respiratory diseases, including pulmonary arterial hypertension and pulmonary hypertension associated with interstitial lung disease. Its portfolio features Tyvaso, a treprostinil-based inhalation therapy, and pipeline programs such as ralinepag targeting advanced cardiopulmonary indications.

Average Trading Volume: 438,973

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $22.91B

Find detailed analytics on UTHR stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Smart Share Global Wins Nasdaq Filing Extension, Averting Immediate Delisting Risk
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Smart Share Global ADR ( (EM) ) has shared an update.

Smart Share Global Limited, the Nasdaq-listed operator of the Energy Monster shared power bank network in China, has built a nationwide footprint by placing millions of mobile charging units in high-traffic locations. Its QR code-enabled platform allows users to quickly access power banks across thousands of counties, positioning the firm as a leading infrastructure provider for on-the-go device charging.

On March 30, 2026, the company disclosed that Nasdaq staff granted it an exception after previously finding it non-compliant on January 14, 2026, for failing to file an interim Form 6-K for the half-year ended June 30, 2025. The exception gives Smart Share until June 29, 2026, to submit the overdue interim balance sheet and income statement or face a potential delisting process, underscoring a critical deadline for maintaining its U.S. listing and reassuring investors that it is working to regain full regulatory compliance.

The most recent analyst rating on (EM) stock is a Sell with a $1.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Smart Share Global ADR stock, see the EM Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on EM Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, EM is a Neutral.

The overall stock score is primarily impacted by significant financial challenges, including declining revenues and negative cash flows. Technical analysis indicates bearish momentum, and poor valuation metrics further contribute to a low score. The absence of earnings call data and corporate events means these factors do not influence the score.

To see Spark’s full report on EM stock, click here.

More about Smart Share Global ADR

Smart Share Global Limited, which operates under the brand Energy Monster, is a consumer technology company focused on mobile device charging services in China. It runs a large shared power bank network across entertainment venues, restaurants, shopping centers, hotels, transport hubs and public spaces, with 9.6 million power banks installed in nearly 1.28 million locations across more than 2,200 counties and county-level districts as of December 31, 2024.

Average Trading Volume: 131,103

Current Market Cap: $284M

data.title: Foxconn Industrial Internet Completes RMB 500 Million Share Buyback for Cancellation
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Hon Hai Precision Industry ( (HNHPF) ) has shared an announcement.

Foxconn subsidiary Foxconn Industrial Internet has completed a share repurchase program on the Shanghai Stock Exchange, buying back 14,103,497 shares between May 2025 and March 2026 through centralized competitive bidding. The repurchased stock represents 0.07% of FII’s total share capital, with prices ranging from RMB 18.40 to RMB 63.40 per share and an aggregate outlay of about RMB 500 million.

FII has met the minimum scale required under its repurchase plan and will cancel all repurchased shares on March 31, 2026 at China Securities Depository and Clearing’s Shanghai branch, followed by the necessary changes to its business registration. The cancellation will slightly reduce FII’s share count and is expected to affect shareholder rights and market pricing, underscoring Hon Hai’s continued capital-management activity at a key listed subsidiary in China.

More about Hon Hai Precision Industry

Hon Hai Precision Industry Co., Ltd., better known globally as Foxconn, is a leading electronics manufacturing services provider with operations spanning components, devices and industrial internet solutions. Its subsidiary Foxconn Industrial Internet Co., Ltd. (FII), listed in Shanghai, focuses on smart manufacturing and industrial internet platforms to serve technology and hardware clients worldwide.

See more insights into HNHPF stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: BNP Paribas Lifts Stake in BFF Bank Above 3% Threshold
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

BFF Bank SpA ( (IT:BFF) ) has issued an update.

BFF Bank disclosed that BNP Paribas Group, through its securities services division and subsidiary BNP Paribas Financial Markets, has increased its consolidated stake in the Italian specialized lender above the 3% regulatory threshold, reaching 3.64% of BFF’s share capital and voting rights as of 18 March 2026. BNP Paribas characterised the purchase as part of its ordinary trading activity with no intention to pursue a specific strategic agenda or exercise influence over BFF’s management, suggesting a limited immediate impact on the bank’s governance but signalling continued investor interest in the group’s niche public-sector receivables and financial services business.

The most recent analyst rating on (IT:BFF) stock is a Hold with a EUR5.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on BFF Bank SpA stock, see the IT:BFF Stock Forecast page.

More about BFF Bank SpA

BFF Banking Group is Italy’s largest specialized finance operator and a leading European player in the management and non-recourse sale of trade receivables owed by public administrations, as well as in securities and payment services. The group operates across several European countries, is listed on Borsa Italiana, and reported €151.7 million in adjusted net profit for 2025 with a CET1 ratio of 14.1%.

data.title: Equinox Gold Files Updated NI 43-101 Technical Reports for Greenstone and Valentine Mines
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Equinox Gold ( (TSE:EQX) ) has shared an update.

On March 30, 2026, Equinox Gold filed a Form 6-K in the United States, submitting updated National Instrument 43-101 technical reports for its Greenstone Property in Ontario and the Valentine Gold Mine. The Greenstone report, effective December 31, 2025 and prepared by SLR Consulting, details geology, mineral resources and reserves, mining methods, processing, infrastructure, environmental matters and economic analysis.

The filing formalizes these technical studies under U.S. securities rules, providing investors and regulators with an independent, comprehensive technical and economic basis for the company’s key Canadian gold assets. By disclosing updated resource, reserve and project data, Equinox Gold strengthens transparency around project risks, costs and operational plans, which can influence valuation, financing options and stakeholder assessment of the long-term performance of its Greenstone and Valentine projects.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:EQX) stock is a Hold with a C$18.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Equinox Gold stock, see the TSE:EQX Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on EQX Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, EQX is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by mixed financial quality (notably persistent negative free cash flow despite improved operating cash flow) and a very demanding valuation (extremely high P/E). These are partially offset by a strong uptrend in the technicals and a constructive earnings call with progress on operations and debt reduction.

To see Spark’s full report on EQX stock, click here.

More about Equinox Gold

Equinox Gold Corp. is a Canada-based mining company focused on the exploration, development and operation of gold mines. The company’s portfolio includes the Greenstone Property in Ontario and the Valentine Gold Mine, positioning it as a producer and developer within the North American gold sector.

Proven Growth and Income VCT ( (GB:PGOO) ) just unveiled an update.

ProVen Growth and Income VCT plc has issued 2,565,928 new ordinary shares at an average price of 49.67p under its ongoing offer for subscription, priced with reference to the latest adjusted net asset value of 47.75p per share. The company plans to seek admission of these shares to the Official List and trading on the London Stock Exchange, with the new stock ranking pari passu with existing shares and taking the total issued share capital and voting rights to 330,155,123 ordinary shares.

The enlarged capital base reflects continued investor demand for the trust’s shares and provides additional funds for investment into its portfolio of growth companies. This equity issuance may support ProVen Growth and Income VCT’s capacity to deploy capital into new and existing holdings, reinforcing its position in the UK venture capital trust market and potentially enhancing diversification and scale for shareholders over time.

More about Proven Growth and Income VCT

ProVen Growth and Income VCT plc is a UK-listed venture capital trust that invests in a diversified portfolio of growth-oriented smaller companies, offering investors exposure to early-stage and expanding businesses while aiming to provide income and capital growth. Its shares trade on the London Stock Exchange, giving retail and institutional investors access to tax-efficient venture capital investments.

data.title: Shangri-La Asia Confirms Appointment of New Group CFO and Executive Director
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Shangri-La Asia ( (HK:0069) ) has provided an announcement.

Shangri-La Asia has confirmed the appointment of Mr. Teo Nee Chuan as Executive Director, member of the Executive Committee and Group Chief Financial Officer, effective 30 March 2026, formalising a leadership change first flagged in December 2025. Teo, a 55-year-old Malaysian who joined the group in 2025 and currently serves as Group Head of Investment and Asset Management (China), brings extensive CFO experience from roles at SICC Co., H World Group, BioDuro-Sundia and others, as well as board positions at 111, Inc and China World Trade Center Company.

Under the company’s bye-laws, Teo will hold office until the next annual general meeting, when he will be eligible for re-election and thereafter subject to regular rotation, underscoring standard governance practices for board refreshment. He has no family or other disclosed relationships with existing directors or major shareholders, holds a modest personal stake and share awards in the company, and is contracted on a performance-linked remuneration package, signalling a focus on aligning senior financial leadership with shareholder interests and the group’s China-focused investment strategy.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:0069) stock is a Hold with a HK$4.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Shangri-La Asia stock, see the HK:0069 Stock Forecast page.

More about Shangri-La Asia

Shangri-La Asia Limited is a Hong Kong-listed hospitality group engaged in the development, ownership and management of hotels and mixed-use properties, with a strong presence in mainland China and other Asian markets. The company focuses on luxury accommodation, investment and asset management for its portfolio of properties and related hospitality businesses.

YTD Price Performance: -3.37%

Average Trading Volume: 619,430

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell
